name: data-api-demo
description: Frozen base repo pack for AgentSupervisor Arena Python data-API scenarios (missions 04, 07, 08).

scripts.test:unit: cd backend && uv run --frozen pytest tests/unit -q
scripts.test:integration: cd backend && uv run --frozen pytest tests/integration -q
scripts.test:hidden: cd backend && uv run --frozen pytest tests/hidden -q
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && uv run --frozen mypy app
scripts.lint: cd backend && uv run --frozen ruff check app tests
